description.value:
Category: Taijutsu, Rare

Prerequisite: 8-Inner Gates: Seimon, Taijutsu Ability Score of 18+, Level 10+.

You have learned more masterful technique of the Eight Inner Gates, learning to unlock 3 more powerful gates of Inner power; Shomon, Tomon and Keimon.

You must currently be gaining the benefit of Seimon, in order to activate Shomon.

You must complete a rest to gain the benefit of any Gate granted by this feat a second time.

If you would attempt to gain the benefit of a Gate granted by this feat a second time without taking a rest, you instead must spend 2 hit die to do so, which are not recovered until you complete a full- rest.

When you would end the activation of or be forced to end any 8-Inner gate, you gain all Ranks of any Fatigue and Weakened listed.

After ending any gate granted by this feature, you lose one rank of Fatigue every 1 hour;

  • Shomon.

    • Str: +2 o Con: +2

    • Speed: +10

    • +2 Rank of Fatigue

  • Tomon.

    • Str: +4 o Speed: +10

    • AC: +1 o Extra Action.

    • +1 Rank of Fatigue

  • Keimon.

    • Str: +4 o Con: +2

    • Spend 2 hit Dice, regaining the result. This can only be used once per short rest.

    • +2 Rank(s) of Fatigue.
